headlines.title: Chuck Schumer lays out plan to fight Trump’s ‘anti-weaponization’ fund in the Senate
headlines.description: The Senate minority leader said Democrats would use Senate procedure to try to kill President Donald Trump’s $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund, forcing Republicans to vote to preserve the compensation money.

headlines.title: Primary challengers threaten to unseat House members across the country
headlines.description: Four House members have already lost re-election bids so far this year, just a few months into primary season.

headlines.title: Graham Platner’s wife ‘angry’ her disclosures of his extramarital sexting were made public
headlines.description: The wife of Graham Platner, the presumptive Democratic nominee for the Senate in Maine, said she is “really angry” about reports that she previously told her husband’s campaign he had exchanged sexually explicit texts with other women.“It makes me really angry, disappointed,” Platner’s wife, Amy Gertner, said in a direct-to-camera video Platner’s campaign released Saturday night.

headlines.title: U.S. and Iran dig in as talks to end war stall
headlines.description: As the world waits for any signs of progress between the U.S. and Iran, the Iranian foreign minister told state media on Sunday that talks between the two countries to end the war are still ongoing. NBC News’ Daniele Hamamdjian reports.

headlines.title: Andy Beshear says ‘we were all concerned’ watching Biden’s 2024 debate after Jill Biden speaks out
headlines.description: Gov. Andy Beshear (D-Ky.) tells Meet the Press the Democratic party should be able to look at President Biden’s 2024 campaign as “a decision that should have been made differently.”

headlines.title: Mike Pence calls DOJ anti-weaponization fund ‘deeply offensive’ and ‘bad idea’
headlines.description: In an interview with Meet the press, former Vice President Mike Pence says he would encourage the Trump administration to drop the $1.8 billion fund to pay people who say they were unfairly investigated or prosecuted by the government, including those who attacked officers on January 6th.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Mike Pence says the Trump administration has ‘departed’ from conservative principles
headlines.description: Former Vice President Mike Pence said the second administration of President Donald Trump has “departed” from traditional conservative principles in the president’s second term.

headlines.title: Andy Beshear says ‘Texas is in play’ for Democrats after Ken Paxton’s Senate GOP primary win
headlines.description: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear said Sunday that “Texas is in play” for Democrats in this year’s Senate race after state Attorney General Ken Paxton beat Sen. John Cornyn.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Massive leadership vacuum weakens U.S. diplomacy in the face of global crises
headlines.description: Hundreds of diplomats have been forced to retire or were laid off in the Trump administration

headlines.title: Trump suggests canceling performances at ‘Great American State Fair’ after artists back out
headlines.description: President Donald Trump suggested canceling planned musical performances at the Great American State Fair in Washington this summer after several artists pulled out of the event.
